---
title: "$title"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false

from pathlib import Path
import html
import yaml
from IPython.display import HTML, display


def find_audit_project_root(start: Path) -> Path:
    current = start.resolve()

    while current != current.parent:
        if (current / "03_audit_program" / "audit_program.yml").exists():
            return current
        current = current.parent

    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "Could not find 03_audit_program/audit_program.yml. "
        "Run this document from inside the audit project."
    )


def escape(value) -> str:
    return html.escape("" if value is None else str(value))


def text_value(value) -> str:
    return "" if value is None else str(value).strip()


def render_metadata_card(row: dict) -> str:
    control_id = text_value(row.get("control_id", ""))
    gap_id = text_value(row.get("gap_id", ""))

    if control_id:
        control_or_gap = f'{control_id} — {text_value(row.get("control_description", ""))}'
    elif gap_id:
        control_or_gap = f'{gap_id} — {text_value(row.get("control_description", ""))}'
    else:
        control_or_gap = text_value(row.get("control_description", ""))

    fields = [
        ("Workpaper", row.get("workpaper_ref", "")),
        ("Test ID", row.get("test_id", "")),
        ("Risk", f'{text_value(row.get("risk_id", ""))} — {text_value(row.get("risk_title", ""))}'),
        ("Control / gap", control_or_gap),
        ("Owner", row.get("control_owner", "")),
        ("Design assessment", row.get("design_assessment", "")),
        ("Planning approach", row.get("planning_approach", "")),
    ]

    rows_html = "\n".join(
        f"<dt>{escape(label)}</dt><dd>{escape(value)}</dd>"
        for label, value in fields
        if text_value(value)
    )

    return f"""
<div class="audit-meta">
<div class="audit-meta-title">Workpaper metadata</div>
<dl>
{rows_html}
</dl>
</div>
"""


def render_text_block(value) -> str:
    text = text_value(value)

    if not text:
        return "<p><em>Not completed in audit_program.yml.</em></p>"

    return "<p>" + escape(text).replace("\n", "<br>") + "</p>"


def render_ordered_list(items) -> str:
    if not items:
        return "<p><em>Not completed in audit_program.yml.</em></p>"

    if isinstance(items, str):
        items = [items]

    list_items = "\n".join(
        f"<li>{escape(item)}</li>"
        for item in items
    )

    return f"""
<ol class="audit-procedure-list">
{list_items}
</ol>
"""


audit_project_root = find_audit_project_root(Path.cwd())
audit_program_path = audit_project_root / "03_audit_program" / "audit_program.yml"

audit_program = yaml.safe_load(
    audit_program_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
) or {}

workpaper_ref = "$workpaper_ref"

program_rows = audit_program.get("program_rows", [])
matching_rows = [
    row for row in program_rows
    if row.get("workpaper_ref") == workpaper_ref
]

if not matching_rows:
    raise ValueError(f"Workpaper reference not found in audit_program.yml: {workpaper_ref}")

program_row = matching_rows[0]
```

```{python}
#| label: workpaper-context
#| echo: false

display(HTML(render_metadata_card(program_row)))
```

## Test hypothesis

```{python}
#| label: test-hypothesis
#| echo: false

display(HTML(render_text_block(program_row.get("test_hypothesis", ""))))
```

## Planned test script

```{python}
#| label: planned-test-script
#| echo: false

display(HTML(render_ordered_list(program_row.get("test_script", []) or [])))
```

---

## Work performed

Describe what was actually done.

Include relevant details such as:

- data sources used;
- scripts, queries, or analysis performed;
- samples selected;
- follow-up questions asked;
- management explanations received;
- limitations encountered.

## Evidence used and evaluated

List evidence actually used and explain whether it was sufficient and reliable for the test purpose.

Reference files instead of copying their content.

Examples:

```text
04_evidence/02_raw_data/...
04_evidence/03_correspondence/...
04_evidence/05_screenshots/...
04_evidence/99_generated/...
```

## Results

Summarize the test results.

Include:

- population tested;
- exception counts;
- exception value, if relevant;
- examples reviewed;
- confirmed exceptions;
- false positives or excluded items;
- unresolved items.

## Conclusion

State the workpaper conclusion.

For control testing, conclude whether the control operated effectively.

For data analysis or red-flag testing, conclude whether the indicator was confirmed and whether an audit observation is needed.

## Observation proposal

Complete this small YAML block only if the workpaper conclusion indicates that an observation should be created.

If no observation is needed, leave the title empty.

```yaml
proposed_observation:
  title: ""
```
